paylod="faqFor=TerminalCustomTradeStrategy"
preview="{statusCode: 200, message: "Success",…}
data
: 
[{faqGroup: "Main", faqTitle: "What is the meaning of BUY, BUY EXIT, SELL, SELL EXIT?",…},…]
0
: 
{faqGroup: "Main", faqTitle: "What is the meaning of BUY, BUY EXIT, SELL, SELL EXIT?",…}
faqDescription
: 
"BUY = Take a new Long position\nBUY EXIT = Close existing Long position\nSELL = Take a new Short position\nSELL EXIT = Close existing Short Position\n\nNote: If the BUY position does not exist and you call BUY EXIT then the system will reject the call"
faqGroup
: 
"Main"
faqTitle
: 
"What is the meaning of BUY, BUY EXIT, SELL, SELL EXIT?"
1
: 
{faqGroup: "Main", faqTitle: "Can I take multiple BUY/SELL position in single symbol?",…}
faqDescription
: 
"No, you can not pass the BUY signal if the symbol has a BUY/SELL position. In the same way you can not pass the SELL signal if the symbol has a SELL/BUY position"
faqGroup
: 
"Main"
faqTitle
: 
"Can I take multiple BUY/SELL position in single symbol?"
2
: 
{faqGroup: "Main", faqTitle: "Can i modify strategy after live deploy?",…}
faqDescription
: 
"Yes, you can modify the strategy even if the strategy is already running.\nNote: You can not modify symbols that have running positions."
faqGroup
: 
"Main"
faqTitle
: 
"Can i modify strategy after live deploy?"
3
: 
{faqGroup: "Main", faqTitle: "System will calculate available capital?",…}
faqDescription
: 
"Yes, the system will update capital as per trades profit loss."
faqGroup
: 
"Main"
faqTitle
: 
"System will calculate available capital?"
4
: 
{faqGroup: "Main", faqTitle: "Can i use this plugin for intraday strategy?",…}
faqDescription
: 
"Yes, you can set trading type as intraday and the system will close all open positions based on defined exit time."
faqGroup
: 
"Main"
faqTitle
: 
"Can i use this plugin for intraday strategy?"
5
: 
{faqGroup: "Main", faqTitle: "Which market segments are supported in this plugin?",…}
faqDescription
: 
"All market segments are support like NSE-EQ,NFO,MCX,CDS,CRYPTO etc"
faqGroup
: 
"Main"
faqTitle
: 
"Which market segments are supported in this plugin?"
6
: 
{faqGroup: "Main", faqTitle: "Can i set Qty multiply on this strategy?",…}
faqDescription
: 
"Yes, you can set the QtyX value at the time of strategy deployment."
faqGroup
: 
"Main"
faqTitle
: 
"Can i set Qty multiply on this strategy?"
message
: 
"Success"
statusCode
: 
200"

response="{
    "statusCode": 200,
    "message": "Success",
    "data": [
        {
            "faqGroup": "Main",
            "faqTitle": "What is the meaning of BUY, BUY EXIT, SELL, SELL EXIT?",
            "faqDescription": "BUY = Take a new Long position\nBUY EXIT = Close existing Long position\nSELL = Take a new Short position\nSELL EXIT = Close existing Short Position\n\nNote: If the BUY position does not exist and you call BUY EXIT then the system will reject the call"
        },
        {
            "faqGroup": "Main",
            "faqTitle": "Can I take multiple BUY/SELL position in single symbol?",
            "faqDescription": "No, you can not pass the BUY signal if the symbol has a BUY/SELL position. In the same way you can not pass the SELL signal if the symbol has a SELL/BUY position"
        },
        {
            "faqGroup": "Main",
            "faqTitle": "Can i modify strategy after live deploy?",
            "faqDescription": "Yes, you can modify the strategy even if the strategy is already running.\nNote: You can not modify symbols that have running positions."
        },
        {
            "faqGroup": "Main",
            "faqTitle": "System will calculate available capital?",
            "faqDescription": "Yes, the system will update capital as per trades profit loss."
        },
        {
            "faqGroup": "Main",
            "faqTitle": "Can i use this plugin for intraday strategy?",
            "faqDescription": "Yes, you can set trading type as intraday and the system will close all open positions based on defined exit time."
        },
        {
            "faqGroup": "Main",
            "faqTitle": "Which market segments are supported in this plugin?",
            "faqDescription": "All market segments are support like NSE-EQ,NFO,MCX,CDS,CRYPTO etc"
        },
        {
            "faqGroup": "Main",
            "faqTitle": "Can i set Qty multiply on this strategy?",
            "faqDescription": "Yes, you can set the QtyX value at the time of strategy deployment."
        }
    ]
}"
"
